name: search_web
description: Perform a web search and return a list of result summaries with titles, URLs, and snippets.

max_results.description: Maximum number of search results to return. Default 10.

name: visit_url
description: Navigate to a URL and return the page content as text.

name: fill_form
description: Fill in a form field on the current page with the given value.

url.description: URL of the page containing the form.

field_name.description: Name or identifier of the form field.

value.description: Value to enter into the form field.

name: download_page
description: Download the full HTML content of a page and save it locally.

url.description: URL of the page to download.

save_path.description: Local file path to save the downloaded content.

name: submit_form
description: Submit a form on a page with the provided field values.

url.description: URL of the page containing the form.

form_data.description: Dictionary of field names to values to submit.
